shortFormVideo.hook: Most small business homepages lose the lead in the first 10 seconds.
shortFormVideo.script: Open on the homepage above the fold. Point to three checks: the headline says what you do, proof sits near the first CTA, and the form does not ask for more than the buyer is ready to give. Close with the project brief URL.
shotList: Screen recording of the article headline
Annotated homepage hero with headline, proof, and CTA callouts
Quick checklist overlay: clarity, proof, form, follow-up
Final frame with eb28.co/blog/ and Melbourne Web Studio project brief
shortFormVideo.caption: A homepage does not need to explain everything. It needs to make the next step obvious in the first 10 seconds.
